summary: Lead accepts M7-MAP-DECISION-SURFACE-SYNC-001 after systems_architect ACCEPT and independent qa_reviewer ACCEPT. The accepted implementation synchronizes task rail, strategic map metadata, route queue/district list focus state, and right inspector around UI-derived active action and active object metadata; filters default player map overlays so route/obligation/risk/focus information appears only when phase-relevant or explicitly selected; and preserves command/query/read-model authority boundaries. This acceptance does not approve formal M7 content lock and does not close the task until PR CI passes and the branch enters origin/main.

decisions.decision: Accept M7-MAP-DECISION-SURFACE-SYNC-001 for PR integration after systems_architect and independent QA accepted.

Accept PROJECT_STATUS.md in the cumulative branch as a lead process checkpoint exception, consistent with systems and QA review; the implementation commit itself stayed within allowed UI/Web/test paths.
This task acceptance does not approve formal M7 content lock. M7-SYSTEMIC-INTERACTION-VALIDATION-001 must still run before product-owner reconsideration.
No sim-core, protocol, save-format, content-source, Electron, server, telemetry, final art, dependency, or manual node battle scope is approved or changed.

risks.summary: QA noted existing map accessibility copy with read-model wording outside the updated visible legend path. It is not a blocker for this task but should be considered if later UX review expands to screen-reader copy.
The broader systemic recovery still needs M7-SYSTEMIC-INTERACTION-VALIDATION-001 and product-owner content-lock reconsideration.
